occupation: Head of Marketing Strategic at Alternative Media Group
headline: Head of Strategic at AMG, PT Alternative Media Group
summary:
I am a seasoned Business & Marketing Strategist with expertise in crafting innovative strategies across various industries.

With a strong background in marketing, Out-of-Home advertising, and Programmatic DOOH, I’ve successfully led high-impact projects, including C-level events, government presentations, and multimedia productions.

My experience spans roles such as Business Manager, Marketing Strategist, and Event Producer, showcasing my ability to deliver results and drive success.
